author: y4rr
content: ferrotorch-graph crate added (26th workspace member). scatter_add primitive added to ferrotorch-core. GcnConv with degree-normalized aggregation (D^-1/2 A D^-1/2), self-loop adding, scatter-based message passing. 2-layer GCN matches PyG examples/gcn.py. PASS bit-level: cosine_sim=1.0, max_abs=2e-6, argmax_agree=100%, test_acc=0.8040 identical to PyG. Pinned to ferrotorch/gcn-cora (SHA c535acff353f). 10 lib tests.
